title: Body of Knysna man found near Gouritz River Bridge
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - KwaNonqaba Police have...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - KwaNonqaba Police have opened an inquest docket after the body of a man was found near the Gouritz River Bridge this morning, 29 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - KwaNonqaba Police have opened an inquest docket after the body of a man was found near the Gouritz River Bridge this morning, 29 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape Police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies said the body was found at 08:00 by a member of the public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the deceased is believed to be 65 years old and is from Knysna.","html":"He said the deceased is believed to be 65 years old and is from Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said the circumstances surrounding his death are still under investigation.","html":"Spies said the circumstances surrounding his death are still under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you or a loved one is battling depression, call the following 24-hour toll-free emergency helplines:","html":"If you or a loved one is battling depression, call the following 24-hour toll-free emergency helplines:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Suicide Crisis Helpline - 0800 567 567","html":"• Suicide Crisis Helpline - 0800 567 567"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Cipla Mental Health Helpline - 0800 456 789 or SMS 31393","html":"• Cipla Mental Health Helpline - 0800 456 789 or SMS 31393"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• NPOwer SA Helpline - 0800 515 515 or SMS 43010","html":"• NPOwer SA Helpline - 0800 515 515 or SMS 43010"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Healthcare Workers Care Network Helpline - 0800 21 21 21 or SMS 43001","html":"• Healthcare Workers Care Network Helpline - 0800 21 21 21 or SMS 43001"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Body of Knysna man found near Gouritz River Bridge
